rationale: A visible and overwhelming display of air and ground assets along the front will shatter enemy morale and expose the fragility of their stabilized line as a deception.
Continuous high-alert air patrols over our forward positions will deter opportunistic strikes and maintain combat readiness amid diplomatic uncertainty.
We must regain intelligence dominance after the drone shootdown by deploying stealth assets to monitor enemy repositioning under the cover of our show of force.
Given the moderate crisis level and ongoing intelligence threats, we must secure our networks against counterintelligence and potential cyber retaliation following the drone shootdown.
Our sources indicate increased foreign advisory presence; we must infiltrate and disrupt Tethys-aligned intelligence cells before they compromise our operational gains.

To counter Western narratives following the drone incident, we will amplify messaging that frames our actions as measured and defensive, aligning with Krasnov’s show of force while managing global perception.

Precision sanctions on Tethysian defense-linked entities will amplify economic pressure without triggering broad retaliation, aligning with Krasnov’s show of force while avoiding overextension under existing sanctions severity.
Seizing Tethysian state assets abroad delivers an immediate financial blow and signals resolve, reinforcing Morozov’s cyber and information efforts by demonstrating coordinated economic retaliation.
Restricting critical raw material exports to Tethys degrades their long-term warfighting capacity, complementing military gains by eroding their industrial sustainability.
A precision strike against overextended Novaris supply lines will exploit their logistical vulnerability and halt further advances.
Deploying naval assets to contested waters demonstrates resolve and pressures Novaris’s maritime supply routes.
A swift, shallow incursion into occupied territory will test enemy response and boost domestic morale.
Strengthening our cyber defenses is critical to protect vital infrastructure and military networks from retaliatory strikes following the drone takedown.
Proactively disrupting Novaris espionage efforts will prevent exploitation of our military and political vulnerabilities during this fragile stabilization.
Launching a coordinated information campaign will shape global perception of our defensive legitimacy and counter Novaris narratives without escalating hostilities.

Given moderate existing sanctions and intelligence confirming overextended supply lines, targeted sanctions on key logistics firms will amplify economic pressure without provoking uncontrolled escalation.
Seizing assets of state-linked Novaris enterprises operating in our jurisdiction complements our legal-diplomatic stance and funds defensive measures.
Proactively negotiating trade terms with non-aligned nations mitigates sanction blowback and strengthens economic resilience amid ongoing stabilization.
A series of high-level diplomatic visits to non-aligned nations will bolster international support and counter Novaris’s narrative amid fragile stabilization.

Utilizing discreet channels to probe Novaris’s willingness to de-escalate demonstrates strategic restraint while preserving operational flexibility in line with our liberal-institutionalist principles.
Establishing monitored humanitarian corridors reinforces our image as a responsible actor, strengthens domestic and international legitimacy, and creates conditions for future peace initiatives.
